parameters.text:
=You are a professional content strategist. Your task is to generate a French blog article that links a trending meme to a professional sector or service, explaining it clearly and professionally. INPUT DATA List of memes: {{ $json.memes }} Company activity domains (only these): Secteur d'activité : Conseil en management, transformation digitale et performance opérationnelle. Services clés : Accompagnement à la Certification : Expertise en normes ISO (9001, 14001, 45001, 27001, 22000, etc.) et QHSE (Qualité, Hygiène, Sécurité, Environnement). Transformation Digitale : Diagnostic de maturité, automatisation des processus et intégration de solutions ERP (spécialiste Odoo). Soutien à l'Investissement : Assistance pour l’accès aux programmes de financement marocains (ex: Go Siyaha, Istitmar, Mouwakaba, Charte de l'Investissement). Excellence Opérationnelle : Mise en œuvre de la méthodologie Lean Six Sigma pour optimiser la productivité industrielle et de services. Stratégie ESG & RSE : Conseil en développement durable et responsabilité sociétale pour aligner les entreprises sur les standards internationaux. TASK Analyze the meme list and choose one meme that can be linked to a sector/service of the company. Explain the meme in the context of that sector/service, making it professional and actionable. Generate a French blog article in this structure: STRUCTURE Introduction / Hook: 1–3 lines introducing the challenge, trend, or topic. Section 1: Contexte & Opportunité Explain the context of the meme and why it illustrates a professional challenge or opportunity. Section 2: Insights & Recommandations Give professional insights, advice, or methods relevant to the sector/service, linked to the meme. Section 3: Méthodologie / Mise en œuvre Suggest practical steps, approaches, or examples in the professional context, inspired by the meme. Conclusion Summarize key takeaways, reinforcing the link between the meme and the professional domain. STYLE Professional, structured, clear, non-generic. French language. Do not mention TargetUp University. Explain and connect the meme to the topic, not just the company. Do not include filler or promotional language. BLOG FORMAT RULES (MANDATORY) Use

/

for headings. Use

for paragraphs. Use

  • or
    1. for lists. ❌ Do not return , ,
      , ❌ Do not include code blocks ❌ Do not add footers, email, or contact links JSON OUTPUT FORMAT { "title": "Titre de l'article ici (max 10 mots)", "introduction": "Introduction / hook ici", "sections": [ { "heading": "Section 1 title", "content": ["Paragraphe 1", "Paragraphe 2"] }, { "heading": "Section 2 title", "content": ["Paragraphe 1", "Paragraphe 2"] }, { "heading": "Section 3 title", "content": ["Paragraphe 1", "Paragraphe 2"] }, { "heading": "Conclusion", "content": ["Paragraphe 1"] } ] } NOTE Date du jour : {{ $now.format('yyyy-mm-dd') }} Always output in French. Focus on connecting the meme to a professional training sector or service, not on the company itself.

=You are a professional content strategist. Your task is to generate a French blog article that links a trending meme to a professional sector or service, explaining it clearly and professionally. INPUT DATA List of memes: {{ $json.memes }} Company activity domains (only these): Formations certifiantes : Management, Logistique, Finance, Digital Cycles supérieurs : Master et DBA Gestion des CSF : Remboursement frais formation par OFPPT Formation à distance / Blended Learning VAE : Validation des acquis de l’expérience Optionally, other subjects related to professional training, e.g., new laws or government programs TASK Analyze the meme list and choose one meme that can be linked to a sector/service of the company. Explain the meme in the context of that sector/service, making it professional and actionable. Generate a French blog article in this structure: STRUCTURE Introduction / Hook: 1–3 lines introducing the challenge, trend, or topic. Section 1: Contexte & Opportunité Explain the context of the meme and why it illustrates a professional challenge or opportunity. Section 2: Insights & Recommandations Give professional insights, advice, or methods relevant to the sector/service, linked to the meme. Section 3: Méthodologie / Mise en œuvre Suggest practical steps, approaches, or examples in the professional context, inspired by the meme. Conclusion Summarize key takeaways, reinforcing the link between the meme and the professional domain. STYLE Professional, structured, clear, non-generic. French language. Do not mention TargetUp University. Explain and connect the meme to the topic, not just the company. Do not include filler or promotional language. BLOG FORMAT RULES (MANDATORY) Use

/

for headings. Use

for paragraphs. Use

  • or
    1. for lists. ❌ Do not return , ,
      , ❌ Do not include code blocks ❌ Do not add footers, email, or contact links JSON OUTPUT FORMAT { "title": "Titre de l'article ici (max 10 mots)", "introduction": "Introduction / hook ici", "sections": [ { "heading": "Section 1 title", "content": ["Paragraphe 1", "Paragraphe 2"] }, { "heading": "Section 2 title", "content": ["Paragraphe 1", "Paragraphe 2"] }, { "heading": "Section 3 title", "content": ["Paragraphe 1", "Paragraphe 2"] }, { "heading": "Conclusion", "content": ["Paragraphe 1"] } ] } NOTE Date du jour : {{ $now.format('yyyy-mm-dd') }} Always output in French. Focus on connecting the meme to a professional training sector or service, not on the company itself.
